items.announcement: Good morning, students. We're excited to announce that the campus bike-share program is expanding with three brand-new docking stations opening next Monday. You'll find them outside the Library, near the South Dining Hall, and beside the Engineering Building. Each station holds twenty bikes, and unlocking one still works through the same mobile app you already use. Please note that the old station behind the gymnasium is being retired, so any bikes left there after Sunday evening will be relocated automatically. To celebrate the launch, the first thirty minutes of every ride will be free during opening week. Be sure to update the app before Monday so the new stations appear on your map.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce new bike-share station locations
options.B: To explain how to download the app
options.C: To apologize for a gymnasium closure

questions.explanation: 正确答案A。公告的核心是宣布下周一新增三个共享单车停靠站，并说明位置和优惠。B只是其中一个细节（更新app），过于狭隘，不是主要目的。C错误，公告并未为体育馆关闭道歉，旧站只是退役。D与公告意图相反，公告是在鼓励而非劝阻骑行。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the station behind the gymnasium?

options.A: It will hold twenty additional bikes
options.B: It offers the longest free rides
options.C: It will no longer be in service
options.D: It is the busiest station on campus

questions.explanation: 正确答案C。公告说体育馆后的旧站正在被retired（退役），周日后留在那里的车会被自动转移，可推断它将停止运营。A错误，二十辆是新站的容量，与旧站无关。B错误，免费时长是针对开业周的所有骑行，并非该站特有。D无任何依据，公告从未提及它最繁忙。

items.situation: cultural food festival organized by international club
items.announcement: Attention students. The International Club is thrilled to invite you to our annual Cultural Food Festival this Saturday on the main lawn from noon until 4 p.m. Students from over twenty countries will be serving homemade dishes, and there will be live music and traditional dance performances throughout the afternoon. Admission is completely free, but if you'd like to taste the food, you'll need to purchase a ticket booklet at the entrance. Each booklet costs five dollars and includes ten tasting coupons. Please bring your own reusable cup, since we're trying to keep the event waste-free this year. We hope to see you there for an afternoon of delicious flavors and culture.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.C: A fundraiser for the music department
options.D: A change to dining hall menus

questions.explanation: 正确答案B。公告主要是邀请学生参加本周六的年度文化美食节，介绍时间、地点和参与方式。A错误，公告与新生迎新无关。C错误，活动并非为音乐系筹款，虽有现场音乐但只是表演环节。D错误，公告未涉及食堂菜单的任何变化。

questions.stem: What are students asked to bring to the event?
questions.explanation: 正确答案D。公告明确请学生自带可重复使用的杯子，以保持活动零废弃。A错误，自制菜肴是来自二十多个国家的学生提供的，不是参加者需带的。B错误，公告从未要求出示学生证。C错误，入场免费，五美元是品尝券手册的价格，且数额被混淆。

items.situation: building wing closure for asbestos removal
items.announcement: I want to inform everyone that the east wing of Harlow Hall will be completely closed for the next three weeks beginning this Thursday. During a routine inspection, contractors discovered aging insulation that requires professional asbestos removal before the space can be reused. All classes normally held in that wing have been relocated to Foster Annex, and updated room assignments were emailed to affected students this morning. Faculty offices in the east wing will remain accessible only through the rear courtyard entrance, which is being kept open for that purpose. Please do not enter any area marked with caution tape, as the sealed zones are part of the active work site. We appreciate your patience while this important safety work is completed.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To advertise renovations to Foster Annex
options.B: To cancel all classes for three weeks
options.C: To inform listeners of a wing closure for safety work
options.D: To recruit contractors for an inspection

questions.explanation: 正确答案C。公告核心是通知Harlow Hall东翼将因石棉清除这一安全施工而关闭三周，并说明相关安排。A错误，Foster Annex只是临时上课地点，并非在宣传其翻新。B错误，课程是被迁移而非取消，与公告内容相反。D错误，承包商是在例行检查中发现问题的，公告并非在招募承包商。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the rear courtyard entrance?

options.A: It provides access to faculty offices
options.B: It is sealed off with caution tape
options.C: It leads directly into Foster Annex
options.D: It will be closed starting Thursday

questions.explanation: 正确答案A。公告说东翼的教师办公室只能通过后院入口进入，而该入口正为此目的保持开放，可推断它提供进入教师办公室的通道。B错误，被警戒胶带封闭的是施工区域，而后院入口恰恰保持开放。C错误，后院入口通向东翼办公室，而非Foster Annex。D错误，周四关闭的是东翼本身，后院入口反而被保留开放。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the campus shuttle will follow a temporary route starting next Wednesday because of road construction near the North Gate. For the next two weeks, the shuttle will no longer stop at the North Gate and will instead pick up passengers at the Recreation Center, just a short walk away. The other stops along the loop remain unchanged, and the shuttle will keep running every fifteen minutes from 7 a.m. to 9 p.m. To avoid confusion, please check the digital signs posted at each stop, which now display real-time arrival updates. We expect the regular route to resume once paving is finished by the end of the month.

questions.stem: What is the primary purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce longer shuttle operating hours
options.B: To promote a new recreation center facility
options.C: To apologize for delayed road paving
options.D: To inform riders of a temporary shuttle route

questions.explanation: 正确答案D。公告主要是提醒乘客因施工，校园班车下周三起将走临时路线。A错误，班车运营时间保持不变，并未延长。B错误，娱乐中心只是新的临时停靠点，并非在推广该设施。C错误，公告未为铺路延误道歉，反而说月底前完工后恢复原路线。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker mention the digital signs?

options.A: Because the shuttle schedule has been shortened
options.B: To help riders track arrivals during the change
options.C: Because all other stops have been canceled
options.D: To explain why the North Gate is closing

questions.explanation: 正确答案B。说话者提到数字标牌是为了让乘客避免混乱，因为标牌显示实时到站信息，可帮助乘客在路线变更期间掌握班车动态。A错误，时刻表并未缩短，班车仍每十五分钟一班。C错误，公告明确说其他站点保持不变，并未取消。D错误，北门停靠取消是因施工，与数字标牌的提及目的无关。

items.situation: financial aid office workshop on scholarship applications
items.announcement: Attention students. The Financial Aid Office is hosting a free workshop on writing strong scholarship applications next Tuesday at 4 p.m. in Room 210 of the Student Services Building. An experienced advisor will walk you through choosing the right scholarships, drafting personal essays, and avoiding the most common mistakes that cost applicants money. Whether you're a first-year student or about to graduate, you're welcome to attend. To reserve a seat, please register through the Financial Aid page on the student portal by Monday at noon. Space is limited to forty participants, so we encourage you to sign up early. Light refreshments will be provided.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To invite students to a scholarship workshop
options.C: To report changes to financial aid policy
options.D: To recruit advisors for the aid office

questions.explanation: 正确答案A。公告核心是邀请学生参加财政援助办公室举办的奖学金申请写作工作坊，并说明时间、地点和报名方式。B错误，公告涉及的是报名截止日，而非奖学金本身的截止日期。C错误，公告未提及援助政策的任何变更。D错误，公告不是在招募顾问，资深顾问是工作坊的主讲人。

questions.stem: What must students do to attend the workshop?

options.A: Submit a draft essay in advance
options.C: Register on the portal by Monday noon

questions.explanation: 正确答案C。公告明确要求学生最迟在周一中午前通过学生门户的财政援助页面报名，以预留座位。A错误，撰写个人陈述是工作坊讲授的内容，并非事先需提交的材料。B错误，工作坊是免费的，无需缴费。D错误，公告从未要求携带经济困难证明。
